title: Kidambi Srikanth Falters at Last Step in US Open Final
indian_angle: Indian shuttler Kidambi Srikanth reached the final of the US Open, showcasing strong form on the international stage.
summary: Kidambi Srikanth's impressive run at the US Open concluded with a loss in the final against Su Li Yang.

title: BAI Adopts 3x15 Scoring for Junior Domestic Tournaments and Nationals
indian_angle: Badminton Association of India introduces a new scoring system for U13, U15, and U17 categories to enhance domestic competition.
summary: The BAI has announced the implementation of a 3x15 scoring system for domestic ranking tournaments and national championships across junior age groups.

title: Shuttler Rounak Chouhan Defeats World No 6 at US Open
indian_angle: Young Indian talent Rounak Chouhan scored a significant upset by beating World No 6 Chou Tien Chen at the US Open.
summary: Cristiano Ronaldo fan Rounak Chouhan made headlines by defeating the higher-ranked Chou Tien Chen in the US Open Super 300.

title: Addendum to Selection Criteria for Badminton Asia U17 & U15 Junior Championships
indian_angle: The BAI has issued further addendum to the selection criteria for Indian juniors aiming for the Badminton Asia U17 & U15 Junior Championships.
summary: An updated addendum to the selection criteria for the 2026 Badminton Asia U17 & U15 Junior Championships has been released by the BAI.

title: BAI Issues Advisory Against Unauthorized Badminton Leagues and Tournaments
indian_angle: The Badminton Association of India has advised players and officials against participating in unauthorized badminton leagues to protect player interests.
summary: The BAI has released an advisory cautioning against participation in various unauthorized badminton leagues, tournaments, and championships.

title: BAI Circular for Grassroot Level Coaches Development Program in Guwahati & Raipur
indian_angle: The BAI is organizing a coaches development program at the grassroot level in NCE Guwahati & Raipur to nurture future Indian talent.
summary: A circular has been issued for a coaches development program focusing on grassroot level training, scheduled for July 15-24 in Guwahati and Raipur.
